ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Job title or designation of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the employee is affiliated with */,
  "campus" TEXT /* Campus where the employee works */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was terminated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_campus FOREIGN KEY ("campus") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who is the head of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_of_department FOREIGN KEY ("head_of_department") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who is the dean of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_dean_id FOREIGN KEY ("dean_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus */,
  "campus_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the campus */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the campus */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the campus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee associated with the account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged into the system */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Last date the user changed their password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee receiving the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health insurance, retirement) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit */,
  "benefit_amount" REAL /* Amount associated with the benefit */,
  "benefit_status" TEXT /* Status of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_performance" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "score" REAL /* Score received in the evaluation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the evaluator */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who conducted the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance_records" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's attendance */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of attendance record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., present, absent, leave) */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time when the employee checked in */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Time when the employee checked out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_records" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee receiving the salary */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of salary paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary was paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of salary payment */,
  "net_salary" REAL /* Net salary after deductions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
